request_text: Re-run review and implement only correct/applicable fixes from prior feedback: (1) login CSRF invalid/missing challenge should be 403 not 400; (2) rotate/refresh preauth CSRF on failed login credentials; (3) enforce auto_public_reply class allowlist in worker triage validation (support/access_config only unless explicitly allowed); (4) ensure scripts/bootstrap_workspace.py initializes system_state defaults including bootstrap_version. Update/add tests accordingly and keep behavior otherwise stable.
